Tomat does not accept code contributions through pull requests.

All code in this repository is written and committed by its maintainers. A pull
request containing code changes will be closed without review. This is a
permanent policy. Please do not invest time in a code pull request.

If you would like to help, the project values these instead:

- Report a bug:
  https://github.com/rzkyif/tomat/issues/new?template=bug-report.yml
- Request a feature:
  https://github.com/rzkyif/tomat/discussions/new?category=feature-requests
- Suggest an improvement:
  https://github.com/rzkyif/tomat/discussions/new?category=improvement-suggestions

If you experimented with an implementation on a fork, publish your findings in
the relevant discussion rather than opening a pull request. See CONTRIBUTING.md
for the full policy and the reasoning behind it.
